subject: session date
fact: The session took place on May 10th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: May 10th, 2026

subject: Sporedome
fact: The party materialized in Sporedome after teleporting away from the battlefield.
source_quote: They materialized in Sporedome

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak rushed out to greet the party upon their arrival in Sporedome.
source_quote: Solom Ned'razak and Xaven Tanor'this rushed out to greet them

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this rushed out to greet the party upon their arrival in Sporedome.
source_quote: Solom Ned'razak and Xaven Tanor'this rushed out to greet them

subject: Brandyr
fact: Drow assistants took custody of Brandyr, the captured Fire Giant.
source_quote: Drow assistants carefully took custody of Brandyr, the captured Fire Giant

subject: Brandyr
fact: Brandyr was moved to a nearby chamber to begin a ritual.
source_quote: moved the enormous creature to a nearby chamber to begin the ritual

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom explained that the ritual for Brandyr would take ten days to complete.
source_quote: the process would take ten days to complete

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom offered the party the option to return to Hillsfar during the ten-day wait.
source_quote: they were given the option to return to Hillsfar

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: The party decided to stay in Sporedome instead of returning to Hillsfar.
source_quote: they decided to stay in Sporedome instead

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom assured the party he would remain in contact through Murssvayas Dhuurniv.
source_quote: he would remain in contact through Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim gained advantage on concentration checks upon leveling up.
source_quote: Bramgrim gaining advantage on concentration checks

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim learned the Word of Radiance cantrip upon leveling up.
source_quote: adding a new radiant prayer to his arsenal

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur considered engineering a device to reshape his elemental attacks.
source_quote: Felkur mused aloud about engineering a device that could reshape the very nature of his elemental attacks

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas refined her archery instincts to fire through cover and hold her ground.
source_quote: Akritas refined her archery instincts, sharpening her ability to fire through cover and hold her ground

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur was referred to as a phantom thief no one could name.
source_quote: Felkur was now, technically, a figure of legend — a phantom thief no one could name

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur asked if he could sell merchandise based on his legendary status.
source_quote: could he sell the merchandise

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: A Mezzaloth lashed out at Daein with a trident but every strike sailed wide.
source_quote: every strike sailed wide

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth vanished and reappeared across the battlefield to avoid Bramgrim's protective spirits.
source_quote: the creature vanished in an instant and reappeared across the battlefield

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth conjured a suffocating cloud of poisonous yellow-green fog.
source_quote: a suffocating cloud of poisonous yellow-green fog conjured by the Mezzaloth

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth's poison caused Bramgrim's concentration on his protective spirits to break.
source_quote: causing his protective spirits to dissolve into nothing

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: Bramgrim hurled a bolt of fire at the Mezzaloth, causing it to stagger.
source_quote: Bramgrim hurled a bolt of fire at the Mezzaloth. The creature, resistant to flame though it was, still staggered from the blow

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The impact of Bramgrim's firebolt scattered the poisonous cloud.
source_quote: the impact was enough to scatter the poisonous cloud at last

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth attempted to shatter the Wall of Force with dispelling magic but failed.
source_quote: attempted to shatter the Wall of Force with a burst of dispelling magic — and failed

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth teleported away in desperation.
source_quote: It teleported away in desperation

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: Daein cut the Mezzaloth down before it could escape.
source_quote: Daein was already moving, cutting the creature down before it could escape

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: A second Mezzaloth arrived carrying a wand crackling with disintegrating energy.
source_quote: a second Mezzaloth arrived carrying a wand crackling with disintegrating energy

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The second Mezzaloth pressed the wand against the Wall of Force.
source_quote: It pressed the wand against the Wall of Force

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The wand caused the Wall of Force to cease to exist.
source_quote: the barrier that had protected the party for five brutal rounds simply ceased to exist

subject: Apprentice Arcanaloth
fact: Three Apprentice Arcanaloths emerged in the chaos.
source_quote: Three Apprentice Arcanaloths had emerged in the chaos

subject: Apprentice Arcanaloth
fact: The Apprentice Arcanaloths screamed for reinforcements.
source_quote: screaming for reinforcements

subject: Apprentice Arcanaloth
fact: One Apprentice Arcanaloth unleashed a roaring fireball that engulfed the entire party.
source_quote: one of the Apprentice Arcanaloths unleashed a roaring fireball that engulfed the entire party

subject: Fire Giant
fact: Two enormous Fire Giants came hauling themselves over the wall.
source_quote: two enormous Fire Giants came hauling themselves over the wall

subject: Fire Giant
fact: The Fire Giants were furious at the party's perceived insults to their master.
source_quote: furious at the party's perceived insults to their master

subject: Fire Giant
fact: The Fire Giants hurled themselves at Daein repeatedly.
source_quote: The giants hurled themselves at Daein again and again

subject: Fire Giant
fact: Every single strike from the Fire Giants fell short and missed Daein.
source_quote: every single strike falling short in a display so improbable it drew stunned silence from the party

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear had come dangerously close to the edge of the poisonous cloud.
source_quote: who had come dangerously close to the edge

subject: Owlbear
fact: Bramgrim managed to heal the battered Owlbear.
source_quote: Bramgrim managed to heal the battered Owlbear

subject: Trident
fact: The Mezzaloth lashed out at Daein with a trident.
source_quote: lashed out at Daein with its trident

subject: Wand of Disintegration
fact: A second Mezzaloth arrived carrying a wand crackling with disintegrating energy.
source_quote: carrying a wand crackling with disintegrating energy

subject: Wand of Disintegration
fact: The wand was pressed against the Wall of Force to destroy it.
source_quote: pressed the wand against the Wall of Force

subject: Wall of Force
fact: Felkur maintained concentration on the invisible Wall of Force.
source_quote: maintaining his concentration on the invisible Wall of Force

subject: Wall of Force
fact: The Wall of Force stood between the party and the enemy forces for five brutal rounds.
source_quote: barrier that had protected the party for five brutal rounds

subject: Wall of Force
fact: The Wall of Force ceased to exist after being struck by the wand of disintegration.
source_quote: simply ceased to exist

subject: Oathbow
fact: Akritas fired her Oathbow at the Shield Guardian.
source_quote: Akritas fires her Oathbow at the Shield Guardian

subject: Oathbow
fact: The Oathbow dealt steady damage to the Shield Guardian.
source_quote: dealing steady damage

subject: Cloudkill
fact: A poisonous cloud filled the area forcing everyone to make constitution saving throws.
source_quote: forcing everyone to make constitution saving throws to resist the toxins

subject: Spiritual Weapon
fact: Bramgrim summoned a floating spectral weapon to keep fighting.
source_quote: summoning a floating spectral weapon to keep fighting

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim's protective spirits dissolved into nothing when his concentration broke.
source_quote: causing his protective spirits to dissolve into nothing

subject: Mezzaloth teleportation
fact: The Mezzaloth vanished in an instant and reappeared across the battlefield.
source_quote: the creature vanished in an instant and reappeared across the battlefield

subject: Bramgrim's concentration break
fact: The poison took its toll on Bramgrim, causing his concentration to break.
source_quote: whose concentration finally broke under the relentless assault

subject: Bramgrim dispel attempt
fact: Bramgrim attempted to clear the toxic fog with a burst of dispelling magic but the cloud held.
source_quote: attempted to clear the toxic fog with a burst of dispelling magic — but the cloud held

subject: Mezzaloth firebolt hit
fact: Bramgrim hurled a bolt of fire at the Mezzaloth.
source_quote: Bramgrim hurled a bolt of fire at the Mezzaloth

subject: Mezzaloth dispel attempt
fact: The Mezzaloth attempted to shatter the Wall of Force with a burst of dispelling magic.
source_quote: attempted to shatter the Wall of Force with a burst of dispelling magic

subject: Mezzaloth death
fact: Daein cut the Mezzaloth down before it could escape.
source_quote: cutting the creature down before it could escape

subject: Fire Giants arrival
fact: Two enormous Fire Giants came hauling themselves over the wall.
source_quote: two enormous Fire Giants came hauling themselves over the wall

subject: Fire Giants attacks
fact: The giants hurled themselves at Daein again and again and missed every single strike.
source_quote: every single strike falling short in a display so improbable it drew stunned silence from the party

subject: Wall of Force destruction
fact: The second Mezzaloth used the wand of disintegration to destroy the Wall of Force.
source_quote: the barrier that had protected the party for five brutal rounds simply ceased to exist

subject: Fireball cast
fact: One of the Apprentice Arcanaloths unleashed a roaring fireball that engulfed the entire party.
source_quote: unleashed a roaring fireball that engulfed the entire party

subject: Party escape
fact: The party seized their moment and teleported away.
source_quote: The party seized their moment and teleported away

subject: Party leveling
fact: The party leveled up after the battle.
source_quote: The party levels up

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Solom Ned'razak will remain in contact with the party through Murssvayas Dhuurniv.
source_quote: he would remain in contact through Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: Ritual duration
fact: The ritual for Brandyr will take ten days to complete.
source_quote: the process would take ten days to complete

subject: Felkur's device
fact: Felkur plans to engineer a device to reshape his elemental attacks.
source_quote: Felkur mused aloud about engineering a device that could reshape the very nature of his elemental attacks
